Title: Stingray City Sandbar & Snorkel (Catamaran - The Far Tortuga)
Notes: Stingray Sailing catamaran excursion. Meet at Royal Watler Cruise Ship Terminal by 8:15am. Includes Stingray City Sandbar and Barrier Reef snorkel stop. $85 USD per person. Captain Chip.

Title: Panama Canal Full Transit
Notes: Full transit of the Panama Canal from Atlantic to Pacific side on Carnival Spirit.

Title: Crossing the International Date Line
Notes: Crossed the International Date Line during the Carnival Panorama transpacific voyage from Singapore to Long Beach.

Title: First Transatlantic Crossing Completion
Notes: Arrived in Ponta Delgada, Azores after crossing the Atlantic on Carnival Valor. First European port of call.

Title: Reykjavik Full Day Port Call
Notes: Extended port call in Reykjavik (9am-11pm) on Carnival Miracle Iceland & British Isles cruise.

Title: Kusadasi / Ephesus Port Call
Notes: Port call at Kusadasi with access to ancient Ephesus ruins, during Carnival Miracle Greece/Turkey/Italy cruise.

Title: Piraeus / Athens Port Call
Notes: Full day in Athens (Piraeus port) on Carnival Miracle. Early 6am arrival gives plenty of time for Acropolis.

Title: Great Barrier Reef - Willis Island Scenic Cruising
Notes: Scenic cruising experience past Willis Island on the Great Barrier Reef aboard Carnival Luminosa.

Title: Bali (Benoa/Denpasar) Port Call
Notes: Full day port call in Bali during Carnival Encounter SE Asia Journeys cruise.

Title: Crossing the Equator
Notes: Crossed the equator heading north from Indonesia to Singapore on Carnival Encounter.

Title: Sapporo / Hokkaido Side Trip
Notes: 3-night trip to Sapporo, Hokkaido via Air Do (HD19/HD24). Explored Hokkaido during late winter.

Title: Kyoto Extended Stay
Notes: Stayed at APA Hotel Kyoto-Gion. Peak cherry blossom season in early April.

Title: Copenhagen Pre-Cruise Exploration
Notes: 2 free days in Copenhagen before boarding Sapphire Princess for Baltic cruise.

Title: Stockholm Port Call
Notes: Port call in Stockholm during Sapphire Princess Baltic cruise. Includes scenic sailing through Stockholm archipelago.

Title: PAX East 2018
Notes: PAX East gaming convention at Boston Convention & Exhibition Center. Also attended Acer Predator After Party at Royale Nightclub (279 Tremont St) on Apr 6 at 9pm. Received Blizzard Battle for Azeroth Beta invite afterward.

Title: PAX East 2019
Notes: PAX East gaming convention at Boston Convention & Exhibition Center. Stayed at Sheraton Boston Hotel (39 Dalton St). Visited Square Enix booth, collected PAX patches.

Title: A Day To Remember: The Degenerates Tour
Notes: Concert at Crown Complex, Fayetteville, NC. Seat 9. Tickets via Cape Fear Tix.

Title: Live Love Paddle Kayak Tour
Notes: Solo kayak tour on Lady Bird Lake, Austin TX. 20 East Riverside Drive. Booked via Reservation Genie.

Title: Brit Floyd: 50 Years of Dark Side
Notes: Pink Floyd tribute concert at North Charleston Performing Arts Center. Tickets transferred via Ticketmaster from Robert.

Title: Live Love Paddle (July 4th)
Notes: July 4th kayak/paddleboard event. Check-in at 1610 East Riverside (AMLI South Shore). Booked via ReservationGenie.

Title: PAX West 2023
Notes: PAX West gaming convention at Seattle Convention Center. Featured Reggie Fils-Aime as Storytime Speaker, Open Mike Eagle concert, Genshin Impact autographing, PAX Arena $10K Street Fighter 6 tournament.

Title: Disneyland Resort (Park + California Adventure)
Notes: Multi-day visit. Ate at Alien Pizza Planet (Tomorrowland) and Rita's Turbine Blenders (San Fransokyo Square, DCA). Confirmation #DD588093831481540608.

Title: PAX West 2024 (20th Anniversary)
Notes: 20th Anniversary PAX West at Seattle Convention Center. Featured Phil Spencer keynote, Lena Raine and Triforce Quartet anniversary concert.

Title: RuneFest 2025
Notes: RuneScape gaming convention at NEC, Birmingham. See Tickets #110020524. Stayed at Moxy Birmingham NEC. Purchased official RF25 hoodie and t-shirt (Jagex, 229.99 GBP).

Title: USS Arizona Memorial / Pearl Harbor
Notes: Reservation #0726951236-1 via Recreation.gov. Visited during Carnival Panorama Honolulu port call.

Title: Paradise Cove Luau
Notes: Confirmation #2082679. 1 attendee. Ko Olina, Oahu. Same day as Pearl Harbor visit.

Title: Laugh Factory: Friday Night All Stars
Notes: 1x General Admission, $27.62. Order ID: S1W4RAEX1Q via Tixr. Laugh Factory Hollywood.

Title: High Roller Observation Wheel
Notes: 1x Anytime Adult ticket, $32.99. Order #3727804 via Caesars Entertainment. The LINQ Promenade.

Title: Formula 1 Emilia Romagna Grand Prix 2025
Notes: AWS Gran Premio del Made in Italy e dell'Emilia-Romagna 2025. E-tickets ready May 9. Post-event survey confirms attendance.

Title: BFI IMAX Screening
Notes: Order #4383024 from BFI.

Title: Korea DMZ Tour (North Korean Meet up & Suspension Bridge)
Notes: Seoul City Tour Co. Ltd. Reservation #1663292571 via Tripadvisor. Pickup from Seoul hotel. Review submitted Jul 18.

Title: Fast & Furious Tokyo Drift JDM Ride Experience
Notes: JDM car ride experience in Tokyo. Booked via Tripadvisor Jul 25.

Title: Niseko United Skiing
Notes: Niseko United lift passes, Booking ID 2983944, Order Ref GEDQQFY7. Ikon Pass holder. Hilton Niseko Village stay.

Title: Universal Studios Japan
Notes: 1 Adult 1-Day Pass. Trip.com Booking #1658111683276761. 2-1 Sakurajima, Konohana Ward, Osaka.

Title: Tokyo DisneySea
Notes: 1-Day Passport, Reservation #A00565953568. 9,900 YEN.

Title: RuneFest 2026
Notes: Gold ticket + merch package (personalized shirts, hoodie, Skill Chip Box). See Tickets #126991608. Total 620.47 GBP.

Title: teamLab Art Installation
Notes: teamLab digital art experience in Toyosu, Koto-ku, Tokyo.

Title: Bamboo Grove (Arashiyama)
Notes: Famous bamboo forest walk in Arashiyama district, Kyoto.

Title: Himeji Castle Visit
Notes: Day trip from Kyoto via Shinkansen to visit Himeji Castle (UNESCO World Heritage Site).

Title: Gion District Evening Walk
Notes: Evening walk through the traditional geisha district of Gion, Higashiyama-ku.

Title: Tatsuko Statue, Lake Tazawa
Notes: Visited the golden Tatsuko statue on the shore of Lake Tazawa, the deepest lake in Japan. Akita Prefecture road trip.

Title: Nyudozaki Lighthouse, Oga Peninsula
Notes: Lighthouse on the northern tip of Oga Peninsula, Akita Prefecture. Scenic coastal views.

Title: Griffith Observatory
Notes: Visited Griffith Observatory including Leonard Nimoy Event Horizon Theater. Iconic LA views.

Title: Hussong's Cantina
Notes: Historic cantina in Ensenada, Mexico. Birthplace of the margarita (est. 1892). Carnival Firenze port call.

Title: Cabo Wabo Cantina
Notes: Sammy Hagar's famous cantina in Cabo San Lucas. Carnival Firenze port call.

Title: Steamboat Ski Resort
Notes: 2 days skiing at Steamboat Springs, CO. Stayed at Upper Rockies condos in Mountain Village. Ikon Pass holder.

Title: Tower of London
Notes: Visited the White Tower at the Tower of London.

Title: Stonehenge
Notes: Visited Stonehenge (UNESCO World Heritage Site) while staying at Holiday Inn Salisbury Stonehenge.

Title: The Temple Bar
Notes: Iconic Dublin pub on St. Patrick's Day (March 17).

Title: Galway Pub Crawl (An Pucan, The Quays)
Notes: Multiple evenings exploring Galway's pub scene including An Pucan and The Quays. Stayed at The Victoria Hotel, Eyre Square.

Title: Les Arcs / Paradiski Skiing
Notes: Skiing at Les Arcs (Arc 1600) in the Paradiski area, French Alps. Visited Le Spot and Le Cairn. Stayed at Arcadien Hotel & Spa.

Title: Nassau Downtown + Senor Frog's
Notes: Explored Nassau downtown and visited Senor Frog's during Carnival Valor transatlantic port call.

Title: Ponta Delgada Marina Exploration
Notes: Explored Marina de Ponta Delgada in the Azores during Carnival Valor transatlantic port call.

Title: Pacha Nightclub Barcelona
Notes: Night out at Pacha nightclub in Barcelona after disembarking Carnival Valor transatlantic cruise.

Title: Checkpoint Charlie
Notes: Visited the historic Cold War border crossing point between East and West Berlin.

Title: Titanic Belfast
Notes: Visited the Titanic Belfast museum during Carnival Miracle Iceland cruise port call.

Title: Seydisfjordur Exploration
Notes: Explored the colorful town of Seydisfjordur in eastern Iceland during Carnival Miracle port call.

Title: Grindavik / Blue Lagoon Area
Notes: Visited the Grindavik area near the Blue Lagoon during Reykjavik port day on Carnival Miracle.

Title: Acropolis Walk
Notes: Walked around the Acropolis area during Carnival Miracle Piraeus (Athens) port call.

Title: Beyoglu District (Istiklal Avenue / Taksim)
Notes: Explored Beyoglu entertainment and cultural district, including Istiklal Avenue and Taksim Square area, during Carnival Miracle Istanbul port call.

Title: Fortress Sydney (Gaming Lounge)
Notes: Gaming lounge in Sydney. Also visited again on Feb 1. Orders via GoTab.

Title: Formula 1 Aramco Japanese Grand Prix 2026
Notes: 3-day West Area pass at Suzuka Circuit. Order #35378659, $167.53. Booked Feb 1, 2026 via formula1.com.

Title: Tenet (IMAX Movie)
Notes: Cinemark at Myrtle Beach, 2100 Coastal Grand Circle. 2 tickets, seats F8 & F9. Fandango #3455425850606. $25.84.

Title: AeroGuard Discovery Flight
Notes: Introductory airplane flight lesson at AeroGuard Flight Training Center, 201 Stearman Drive, Georgetown, TX 78628. Invoice #1972, $100.

Title: F9: The Fast Saga (IMAX Movie)
Notes: Regal Gateway & IMAX, Austin TX. Fandango #WPPKD7D. 2h 25m runtime.

Title: The Boss Baby: Family Business (Movie)
Notes: Cinemark 14, Austin area. Fandango #3792921343668. 1h 47m runtime.

Title: NASCAR Hall of Fame
Notes: NASCAR Hall of Fame, 400 East Martin Luther King Jr. Blvd, Charlotte, NC 28202. Confirmed by post-visit survey.

Title: PAX West 2022
Notes: PAX West at Seattle Convention Center, 705 Pike Street. ShowClix #3721T3U103399916. Registered for PAX XP.

Title: The Real Mary King's Close
Notes: Underground guided tour on the Royal Mile, Edinburgh. Booking #41959043. 1 Adult, 24.00 GBP.

Title: A Minecraft Movie (Cinemark)
Notes: Cinemark, Auditorium 4, Seats G8, G9, G10 (3 tickets).

Title: F1 Movie in 4DX
Notes: Cinema Sunshine Heiwajima, 4DX format. 3 tickets (2 general 3,100 yen + 1 student 2,100 yen = 8,300 yen total). Seats G-13, G-14, G-15. Brad Pitt F1 film with Japanese subtitles.

Title: Australia Zoo + Meerkat Encounter
Notes: Adult Admission with Sneak Peek + Mischievous Meerkats animal encounter + Meerkat Lapel Pin. Order #9KKH39CH, AUD $201.45. Steve Irwin's Australia Zoo, Queensland.

Title: Universal Studios Singapore + Express Pass
Notes: 1x Adult Admission + Universal Express Standard. Trip.com Booking #1658110200684586. Sentosa Island.

Title: ÖBB Train: Vienna → Salzburg (1st Class)
Notes: ÖBB 1. Klasse train from Wien to Salzburg Stadtbf via St. Pölten, Wels, Linz. Order #4731591852223457. Standard ticket, volle Flexibilität. €143.40 + €13.04 VAT. CO₂ savings: 55.9 kg.

Title: Salzburg Von Trapp Family Homecoming
Notes: Von Trapp family descendant homecoming. Visited: Residenzplatz fountain (I Have Confidence scene), Salzburg Cathedral, Kapitelplatz/Sphaera, Nonnberg Abbey gate (Maria's convent). Staying at Hotel Himmelreich. Tomorrow: Mirabell Gardens (Do-Re-Mi), Fortress Hohensalzburg, Villa Trapp (Traunstrasse 34), Schloss Leopoldskron, Hellbrunn Gazebo.
